- [Lecture 01: 1次元分類の基礎](classification-basics-1d.qmd)
- [Lecture 02: 2次元の決定境界](classification-2d-boundaries.qmd)
- [Optimization: 勾配降下法とNewton法](optimization-gradient-newton.qmd)
- [Appendix: ローカルミニマムと初期値](optimization-local-minima-appendix.qmd)

<script>
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'ArrowUp' || e.key === 'PageUp') {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopImmediatePropagation();
  }
}, true);
</script>
